'''mafate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hintedly|hintedly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-f-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hintedly|hintedly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| mafate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:mafate|mafate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mafatesher|mafatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafatesherĂ«m|mafatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mafatero|mafatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mafateshĂ«|mafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafateshĂ«m|mafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimafatero|gokimafatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimafateshĂ«|gokimafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimafateshĂ«m|gokimafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomafankerom|gomafankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomafankeshĂ«|gomafankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomafankeshĂ«m|gomafankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomafankeya|gomafankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mafaterom|mafaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafatemu|mafatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mafateya|mafateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimafaterom|gokimafaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimafatemu|gokimafatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimafateya|gokimafateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:mafafate|mafafate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mafafatesher|mafafatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafafatesherĂ«m|mafafatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mafafatero|mafafatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mafafateshĂ«|mafafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafafateshĂ«m|mafafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimafafatero|gokimafafatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimafafateshĂ«|gokimafafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimafafateshĂ«m|gokimafafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomafafankerom|gomafafankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomafafankeshĂ«|gomafafankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomafafankeshĂ«m|gomafafankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomafafankeya|gomafafankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mafafaterom|mafafaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafafatemu|mafafatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mafafateya|mafafateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimafafaterom|gokimafafaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimafafatemu|gokimafafatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimafafateya|gokimafafateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:mĂŠfĂŠte|mĂŠfĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mĂŠfĂŠtesher|mĂŠfĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠfĂŠtesherĂ«m|mĂŠfĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mĂŠfĂŠtero|mĂŠfĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«|mĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m|mĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimĂŠfĂŠtero|gokimĂŠfĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«|gokimĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m|gokimĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomĂŠfĂŠnkerom|gomĂŠfĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«|gomĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gomĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomĂŠfĂŠnkeya|gomĂŠfĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mĂŠfĂŠterom|mĂŠfĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠfĂŠtemu|mĂŠfĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mĂŠfĂŠteya|mĂŠfĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimĂŠfĂŠterom|gokimĂŠfĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimĂŠfĂŠtemu|gokimĂŠfĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimĂŠfĂŠteya|gokimĂŠfĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:maffafte|maffafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:maffaftesher|maffaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:maffaftesherĂ«m|maffaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:maffaftero|maffaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:maffafteshĂ«|maffafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:maffafteshĂ«m|maffafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimaffaftero|gokimaffaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimaffafteshĂ«|gokimaffafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimaffafteshĂ«m|gokimaffafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomaffafnkerom|gomaffafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomaffafnkeshĂ«|gomaffafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomaffafnkeshĂ«m|gomaffafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomaffafnkeya|gomaffafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:maffafterom|maffafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:maffaftemu|maffaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:maffafteya|maffafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimaffafterom|gokimaffafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimaffaftemu|gokimaffaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimaffafteya|gokimaffafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
